## Purpose

Describe the focused research, provenance, or repository-control change.

## Evidence

- Canonical first-party source:
- Upstream revision/date:
- Content or artifact digest:
- License/attribution impact:

## Safety boundary

- [ ] No secrets or credentials are included.
- [ ] No discovered code is automatically installed, executed, imported, or activated.
- [ ] Workflow permissions remain read-only unless separately justified.
- [ ] Upstream attribution is preserved.
- [ ] `python scripts/check_repository_quality.py` passes.
